ops.body: Not a bug — verified 2026-07-04. The pack import failure was environmental: a stale SHA-pinned cached pack plus a stale uv-tool capt-hook 8.0.0 (both since removed); the import fix itself shipped long ago (ceb3078, v0.7.1). Hook tests green in CI today: 238/238 (hook-tests job, yasyf/cc-notes).
